lines.en: Class, today we are going to talk about our school rules.
lines.zh: 同学们，今天我们来讨论一下校规。

lines.en: Mr. Li, can we wear our own clothes on Fridays?
lines.zh: 李老师，我们周五可以穿自己的衣服吗？

lines.en: No, you must wear the school uniform every day. That is one of our rules.
lines.zh: 不行，你们每天都要穿校服。这是我们的校规之一。

lines.en: I see. What about being late for class?
lines.zh: 明白了。那上课迟到怎么办？

lines.en: You should arrive at school before eight o'clock. If you are late three times, I will call your parents.
lines.zh: 你们应该在八点之前到校。如果迟到三次，我会给你家长打电话。

lines.en: Can we use our phones during break time?
lines.zh: 课间休息的时候可以用手机吗？

lines.en: I am afraid not. Phones are not allowed at school. You should keep them at home.
lines.zh: 恐怕不行。学校不允许带手机。你们应该把手机留在家里。

lines.en: Are there any rules about the classroom?
lines.zh: 关于教室有什么规定吗？

lines.en: Yes. Keep the classroom clean and do not run in the hallways. These rules keep everyone safe.
lines.zh: 有的。保持教室整洁，不要在走廊里跑。这些规则能保证大家的安全。
